attacking_style: Early-race opportunist targeting breakaways and intermediate sprints rather than late decisive moves. Shows willingness to expend energy in opening phases of races.
team_tactics: Limited data on team support; appears to operate independently in early breakaway attempts without clear domestique setup visible in observations.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to establish clear terrain preference. Both observations focus on sprint points rather than selective terrain.
vulnerability: Extended recovery from serious injury (broken kneecap, 6-month layoff) - durability and form consistency remain question marks given limited post-injury race sample.
key_patterns: Targets intermediate sprints in early race phases (2 observations across different races)
Pursues early breakaway opportunities rather than waiting for decisive moments (2 observations)
Shows aggression immediately post-injury return, suggesting attacking mentality regardless of fitness baseline (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: Successfully returned to racing intensity after 6-month kneecap injury layoff, showing consistent ability to contest sprints across two races spanning six months, suggesting complete recovery
